sentences.target: Meine Fähigkeit hilft mir im Beruf.

translations.de: Meine Fähigkeit hilft mir im Beruf.
translations.en: My ability helps me at work.
translations.es: Mis habilidades me ayudan en el trabajo.
translations.it: Le mie capacità mi aiutano al lavoro.
translations.zh-Hans: 我的能力在工作中很有用。
translations.yue: 我嘅能力喺工作上好有用。
translations.ru: Мои навыки помогают мне на работе.
translations.pt: Minhas habilidades me ajudam no trabalho.
translations.vi: Kỹ năng của tôi giúp tôi trong công việc.
translations.nl: Mijn vaardigheden helpen me op het werk.
translations.uk: Мої навички допомагають мені на роботі.
translations.hi: मेरी क्षमताएँ मुझे काम में मदद करती हैं.
translations.pl: Moje umiejętności pomagają mi w pracy.
translations.el: Οι ικανότητές μου με βοηθούν στη δουλειά.
translations.nb: Ferdighetene mine hjelper meg på jobb.
translations.id: Kemampuan saya membantu saya di tempat kerja.
translations.sv: Mina färdigheter hjälper mig på jobbet.
translations.ro: Abilitățile mele mă ajută la serviciu.
translations.cs: Moje schopnosti mi pomáhají v práci.
translations.da: Mine evner hjælper mig på arbejdet.
translations.ja: 私の能力は仕事で役に立ちます。

tokens.explanation: Attributive possessive determiner modifying 'Fähigkeit'; agrees with feminine singular nominative; determiner of the subject.
Head noun, feminine singular nominative; subject of the finite verb 'hilft'.
Main verb, 3rd person singular present; takes a dative object ('mir') and a prepositional phrase ('im Beruf').
Personal pronoun, 1st person singular dative; indirect object of 'hilft'.
Contraction of 'in dem'; preposition governing the dative; introduces a locative prepositional phrase.
Noun in dative singular; object of the preposition 'im' (locative context).

sentences.target: Er verbessert seine Fähigkeit im Schreiben.

translations.de: Er verbessert seine Fähigkeit im Schreiben.
translations.en: He improves his ability in writing.
translations.es: Él está mejorando su habilidad para escribir.
translations.fr: Il améliore ses compétences en écriture.
translations.it: Sta migliorando la sua capacità di scrittura.
translations.zh-Hans: 他在提高自己的写作能力。
translations.yue: 佢而家喺提升自己嘅寫作能力。
translations.pt: Ele está melhorando sua habilidade de escrita.
translations.he: הוא משפר את כישורי הכתיבה שלו.
translations.vi: Anh ấy đang cải thiện kỹ năng viết của mình.
translations.hi: वह अपनी लेखन क्षमता में सुधार कर रहा है.
translations.el: Βελτιώνει την ικανότητά του στο γράψιμο.
translations.ro: El își îmbunătățește abilitatea de a scrie.
translations.ja: 彼は文章力を伸ばしています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, nominative singular; subject of the clause.
Main verb, 3rd person singular present; transitive, selecting an accusative direct object ('seine Fähigkeit') and a prepositional phrase ('im Schreiben').
Attributive possessive determiner; agrees with feminine singular accusative noun 'Fähigkeit'; determiner of the object.
Noun, feminine singular accusative; direct object of 'verbessert'.
Contraction of 'in dem'; preposition governing the dative; introduces a domain/manner prepositional phrase.
Nominalized infinitive functioning as a noun; dative singular as complement of 'im'; denotes the domain ('in writing').

sentences.target: Ich brauche diese Fähigkeit für den Kurs.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈbʁaʊ̯xə ˈdiːzə ˈfɛːɪçkaɪ̯t fyːɐ̯ deːn kʊʁs./

translations.de: Ich brauche diese Fähigkeit für den Kurs.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈbʁaʊ̯xə ˈdiːzə ˈfɛːɪçkaɪ̯t fyːɐ̯ deːn kʊʁs./
translations.en: I need this ability for the course.
translations.es: Necesito esta habilidad para el curso.
translations.fr: J’ai besoin de cette compétence pour le cours.
translations.it: Ho bisogno di questa capacità per il corso.
translations.yue: 呢個課程需要呢項能力。
translations.ru: Мне нужен этот навык для курса.
translations.pt: Eu preciso dessa habilidade para o curso.
translations.he: אני צריך את המיומנות הזו לקורס.
translations.tr: Bu ders için bu beceriye ihtiyacım var.
translations.vi: Tôi cần kỹ năng này cho khóa học.
translations.nl: Ik heb deze vaardigheid nodig voor de cursus.
translations.uk: Мені потрібна ця навичка для курсу.
translations.hu: Szükségem van erre a képességre a kurzushoz.
translations.hi: मुझे इस कोर्स के लिए यह क्षमता चाहिए.
translations.el: Χρειάζομαι αυτή την ικανότητα για το μάθημα.
translations.nb: Jeg trenger denne ferdigheten til kurset.
translations.id: Saya perlu kemampuan ini untuk kursus.
translations.sv: Jag behöver den här färdigheten för kursen.
translations.ro: Am nevoie de această abilitate pentru curs.
translations.da: Jeg har brug for denne evne til kurset.
translations.ja: この講座にはこの能力が必要です。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, nominative singular; subject of the clause.
Main verb, 1st person singular present; transitive, selecting an accusative direct object ('diese Fähigkeit') and a prepositional phrase ('für den Kurs').
Demonstrative determiner; agrees with feminine singular accusative noun 'Fähigkeit'; determiner of the object.
Noun, feminine singular accusative; direct object of 'brauche'.
Preposition governing the accusative; introduces a purpose/beneficiary prepositional phrase.
Definite article, masculine singular accusative; determiner of 'Kurs' as complement of 'für'.
Noun, masculine singular accusative; object of the preposition 'für'.

sentences.target: Die Chefin lobt meine Fähigkeit heute sehr.
sentences.reading: /diː ˈʃeːfɪn loːpt ˈmaɪ̯nə ˈfɛːɪçkaɪ̯t ˈhɔʏ̯tə zeːɐ̯./

translations.de: Die Chefin lobt meine Fähigkeit heute sehr.
translations.ipa: /diː ˈʃeːfɪn loːpt ˈmaɪ̯nə ˈfɛːɪçkaɪ̯t ˈhɔʏ̯tə zeːɐ̯./
translations.en: The boss praises my ability a lot today.
translations.es: La jefa elogió mucho mi habilidad hoy.
translations.fr: Ma cheffe m’a beaucoup félicité pour mes compétences aujourd’hui.
translations.it: Oggi la mia capo ha elogiato molto le mie capacità.
translations.ko: 오늘 사장님이 내 능력을 많이 칭찬했어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 老板今天很夸奖我的能力。
translations.yue: 老細今日好讚我嘅能力。
translations.ru: Начальница сегодня очень похвалила мои навыки.
translations.pt: A chefe elogiou muito minha habilidade hoje.
translations.he: המנהלת מאוד שיבחה היום את היכולות שלי.
translations.vi: Sếp hôm nay khen kỹ năng của tôi rất nhiều.
translations.nl: Mijn baas prees mijn vaardigheden vandaag heel erg.
translations.uk: Керівниця сьогодні дуже похвалила мої навички.
translations.hu: A főnöknő ma nagyon dicsérte a képességeimet.
translations.hi: आज बॉस ने मेरी क्षमता की खूब तारीफ की.
translations.pl: Szefowa dziś bardzo pochwaliła moje umiejętności.
translations.el: Η διευθύντρια σήμερα επαίνεσε πολύ τις ικανότητές μου.
translations.nb: Sjefen roste ferdighetene mine mye i dag.
translations.id: Bos hari ini sangat memuji kemampuan saya.
translations.sv: Chefen berömde mina färdigheter mycket i dag.
translations.ro: Șefa mi-a lăudat foarte mult abilitățile astăzi.
translations.cs: Šéfová dnes velmi chválila moje schopnosti.
translations.da: Chefen roste mine evner meget i dag.
translations.ja: 今日は上司が私の能力をたくさん褒めてくれました。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, feminine singular nominative; determiner of the subject 'Chefin'.
Common noun, feminine singular nominative; subject of 'lobt'.
Main verb, 3rd person singular present; transitive, selecting the accusative object 'meine Fähigkeit'; modified by adverbs 'heute' (temporal) and 'sehr' (degree).
Attributive possessive determiner; agrees with feminine singular accusative noun 'Fähigkeit'; determiner of the object.
Noun, feminine singular accusative; direct object of 'lobt'.
Temporal adverb modifying the verb 'lobt'.
Degree/intensifier adverb modifying 'lobt'; indicates high extent.
